name: social-skills
description: Social-web skills for AI agents. Wraps HackerNews / Reddit / GitHub / X / LinkedIn / YouTube / Bluesky / arXiv / Medium / Substack / RSS / generic article fetchers, plus search and grounded-answer engines (Perplexity, Grok, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Tavily, SerpAPI). Auto-caches every fetch in a local SQLite ledger so 'have we seen this URL?' is instant.
